company_overview.name: AI Copy Coach
company_overview.tagline: Stop fighting ChatGPT. Install a system that writes like you.
company_overview.mission: We turn AI overwhelm into a done-for-you copywriting and marketing system, so purpose-driven businesses can create content in their own voice that actually drives results.
company_overview.vision: In the next 5 years, help 1,000 businesses install a completely automated copywriting system that runs in their business.

value_proposition.primary_value: A done-for-you copywriting and marketing system installed directly in your business — a co-writer and marketing analyst that writes and publishes all your content in your voice, so you never need to hire a copywriter or fight with AI again.
value_proposition.unique_mechanism: Context engineering, not prompt engineering. The system is installed in Cursor and built on your actual Voice DNA, ICP, and business context — so it already knows your voice, your audience, and your offers. You chat with it; it produces on-voice copy. Coaching on how to run the system is included, and new skills are added over time.
key_differentiators: A system installed in your business — not a tool you rent, a course you watch, or a guru you follow
Built on your actual voice patterns (Voice DNA), so output sounds like you, not generic AI
Marketing agency in a box: a co-writer AND a marketing analyst in one system
One-time install you own forever — no monthly subscription, no ongoing agency retainer
Coaching included, so you actually know how to use it
Expands over time as new skills are added

services.name: The AI Copy Coach System
services.description: A complete copywriting and marketing system installed in your business using Cursor — a co-writer and marketing analyst ('marketing agency in a box') built on your Voice DNA, ICP, and business context. You chat with it to create and publish all your content, in your voice, with full knowledge of your business and audience. Coaching on how to use and run the system is included. New skills are added over time. No need to hire copywriters; no more AI confusion.
services.price_point: $1,997 one-time (price under review — Amir considers this still underpriced)
includes: Full system install in the client's business (via Cursor)
Custom Voice DNA, ICP, and business-profile context
Library of writing skills (LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Substack, email sequences, thought leadership, how-to, bios, profile optimization, and more)
Coaching on how to use the system
Ongoing additions of new skills over time
services.ideal_for: Online service providers (coaches, consultants, agency owners, course creators) doing $200K-$1M+/year who value their voice and would rather invest money than time

free_resources.name: TBD — newsletter (not yet named)
free_resources.description: Regular newsletter teaching the AI Copy Coach philosophy and approach.
free_resources.value: Demonstrates the voice and method in action; primary nurture channel.

free_resources.name: TBD — lead magnet
free_resources.description: A lead magnet to be written using this very system, based on the work done here.
free_resources.status: Planned — to be created with the system

positioning.market_position: Premium but radically better value than the alternatives — a one-time 'agency in a box' for a fraction of the cost of an agency, retainer, or copywriter.
positioning.competitor_comparison: Anti-guru, anti-fluff, anti-course. Not a prompt pack, not a 'ChatGPT for business' course, not a SaaS writing tool, not a copywriter or agency on retainer. It's an owned system installed in your business that replaces all of them — so you never need to hire a copywriter again.
positioning.niche_focus: Installing done-for-you, voice-matched AI copywriting systems for purpose-driven online service providers

brand_voice_summary.personality: Irreverent, direct, self-aware, anti-guru, encouraging without being cheesy
brand_voice_summary.tone: Very casual and conversational, dry humor, confident, warm underneath — entertaining, never hype-y or salesy
values_demonstrated: Make AI sound human, not robotic
No fluff, no hype, no overpriced courses
Simplicity wins — systems beat winging it
Be willing to offend some people to connect with your core audience

social_proof.proof_strategy: Limited traditional social proof at this stage. Primary proof is demonstration content — showing the system producing on-voice copy — rather than testimonials or metrics.

content_pillars.basis: Four-pillar mix with allocation percentages, each pillar organized around specific content formulas (Educate / Relate / Inspire / Sell). Grounded in the AI-writing market sentiment from market-intelligence.json.
content_pillars.allocation_note: Percentages indicate share of total content output.

primary_topics.role: Authority pillar — the workhorse. Teach people what they're doing wrong with AI and what right looks like.

formulas.example: 5 things to stop doing when you use AI to write
How context engineering actually works (and why prompts don't)
82% of people can spot AI writing. Here's why yours gets flagged.
The problem isn't AI. It's that you're using it without context.
Why 'AI can't capture my voice' is wrong (and right)

primary_topics.role: Proof pillar — show, don't tell. Before/afters of AI slop vs. system output, behind-the-scenes of the workflow. Builds trust through evidence.

formulas.example: I switched from prompts to context engineering. Here's what happened.
How I made 7 days of content in 47 minutes (step by step)
How [client] went from 3 hours per post to 20 minutes
Before/after: Generic AI copy vs. Voice DNA copy

primary_topics.pillar: Copywriting Principles That AI Makes Easier
primary_topics.role: Value pillar — positions Amir as someone who understands writing, not just AI. Give actual templates and frameworks.

formulas.example: 3 copywriting hooks that work every time (and how to get AI to write them)
The #1 reason your copy doesn't convert (AI or not)
Plug-and-play CTAs for every type of post
If you learned one copywriting principle a week for 3 months...

primary_topics.role: Personality pillar — the spicy content. Hot takes, calling out the AI hype machine, mocking 'In today's rapidly evolving landscape...'. Engagement invitations drive saves and comments.

formulas.example: Why 'providing value' doesn't work (and what to do instead)
I bought a $497 prompt pack. Here's what happened.
Which AI user are you? The Prompt Hoarder, The Over-Editor, or The Delusional?
The problem with prompt packs, AI courses, and writing tools

content_pillars.format_principle: Show, don't tell. Because social proof is limited, lead with before/after demonstrations (generic AI output vs. voice-matched output), especially in The Content System pillar.
content_pillars.recurring_vehicle: Email & the T.A.L.E. framework (Tell a story, Anchor the lesson, Link to the offer, Encourage action) used as a demonstration vehicle across pillars.
content_pillars.content_mission: Show online businesses that the problem was never AI — it was the approach. Demonstrate, in Amir's voice, that a system installed in your business beats prompts, courses, and copywriters.
content_pillars.content_style: Casual, punchy, contrarian. Story-driven (T.A.L.E.), paradigm shifts over how-to fluff, demonstration over claims. Entertaining first.

primary_cta.action: Answer a short questionnaire about your business to see if you qualify
primary_cta.when_to_use: Main conversion CTA — use to qualify prospects for the AI Copy Coach System install

secondary_ctas.when_to_use: Top-of-funnel nurture for readers not ready to qualify yet

secondary_ctas.action: Reply / DM to start a conversation
secondary_ctas.when_to_use: Soft engagement CTA on social posts and emails

platforms.status: Handles and website to be updated in the future
